title: Pan-Seared Salmon with Norwegian Salad
description: A simple and elegant dish featuring seared salmon and a refreshing Norwegian-inspired salad.
instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt and black pepper.
Heat the luminous olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the salmon for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, combine the chopped bowl lettuce, thinly sliced red onion, and a drizzle of floral honey in a bowl.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the salad and toss to combine.
Serve the seared salmon on top of the Norwegian salad.
